cover.subtitle:
5·16으로 시작된 11년,
경제와 독재가 함께 컸다.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: ONE Korean military officer in 1960s khaki uniform with peaked cap and sunglasses, arms crossed, standing in front of an unfinished concrete highway viaduct (Gyeongbu Expressway construction). Behind him: factory smokestacks and silhouettes of construction cranes. Color palette: cold gray + olive khaki + crimson accent on a single armband. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 6·3 항쟁. 굴욕적 한일 회담 반대 시위.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 브라운 각서·오히라 메모의 구분, 6·3 항쟁의 원인, 3선 개헌의 차수(제6차)와 경제개발 5개년 차수별 주력 산업이 자주 출제된다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of a 1970s factory smokestack and a highway sign shape (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
